mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC for FEDFUNDS changes remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or forward returns show no statistical significance (p > 0.10) during rate decline periods.

mechanism_narrative: A unemployment rate exceeding 4.5 percent signals labor market deterioration and impending earnings recession, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03) when UNRATE crosses the 4.5 threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real personal consumption expenditures and a decline in housing starts indicates a sectoral rotation away from construction toward services, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a Rank IC below 0.04 over any 2-year window, or positive returns do not significantly outperform baseline when RSAFS rises and HOUST falls.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a post-shock recovery phase reflects rapid capacity utilization and margin expansion, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Signal accuracy drops below 50% during recovery phases, or forward returns are negative in > 60% of triggered instances despite rising INDPRO.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index levels above 240 trigger inflation fears and anticipated central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in > 50% of instances when CPIAUCSL exceeds 240, or the threshold fails to separate return distributions (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in total nonfarm payrolls and decreases in the unemployment rate confirm robust labor demand, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The interaction term yields a Rank IC below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or the joint condition fails to predict positive returns with > 55% accuracy.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP reflects sustained aggregate demand expansion, which translates into higher corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC for GDPC1 growth remains below 0.02 over any 2-year window, or forward returns show no significant positive correlation with GDP expansion.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below 102.0 signals supply chain bottlenecks and manufacturing contraction, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances, or the threshold condition fails to generate a statistically significant negative return differential.
